tagline: Pools and Gardens for Fine Homes

hero.headline:
Iconic Exteriors for Dallas'
Finest Homes
hero.subheadline: Your outdoor space should be as extraordinary as the home it surrounds. For over 40 years, Harold Leidner Landscape Architects has designed and built luxury pools, gardens, and outdoor living environments for Dallas' most distinguished properties. We design it, we build it, we guarantee it.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Luxury Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> Designed & Built to Last
services.subtitle: From award-winning pools to curated gardens, every project is conceived and constructed by our team of licensed landscape architects. One vision, one team, one iconic result.

cards.title: Custom Pools & Spas
cards.description: Award-winning luxury swimming pools and spas tailored to complement your home's architecture. From classic elegance to modern infinity edges, designed to be the centerpiece of your property.

cards.title: Water & Fire Features
cards.description: Dramatic fountains, waterfalls, and fire bowls that add dimension, sound, and ambiance to your outdoor environment. Every element custom-designed for your landscape.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Living
cards.description: Fully custom outdoor kitchens and living spaces built for world-class entertaining. Premium materials and professional-grade appliances integrated seamlessly into the landscape.

cards.title: Pergolas & Outdoor Structures
cards.description: Pavilions, cabanas, and covered living spaces designed to extend your home's footprint and provide year-round outdoor enjoyment with architectural integrity.

cards.title: Custom Gardens & Landscaping
cards.description: Expert garden design including French gardens, native plantings, and curated landscape plans that enhance the architecture and setting of your property.

cards.title: Landscape Lighting & Hardscape
cards.description: Professional exterior lighting, driveways, patios, and full property hardscaping that highlights architectural features and creates inviting ambiance day and night.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Iconic Exterior

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Meet with our licensed landscape architects for an on-site consultation. We study your home's architecture, your lifestyle, and your aspirations to develop a comprehensive design concept.

steps.title: We Design & Build It
steps.description: Our in-house team handles everything from initial drawings to final construction. The same architects who conceive your exterior are the ones who build it — no outsourcing, no shortcuts.

steps.title: Live in Your Masterpiece
steps.description: Step into an outdoor environment that is more than beautiful — it's iconic. And with our concierge maintenance, it stays pristine year after year.

about.label: Why Dallas Trusts Harold Leidner
about.headline: The Designers Who Build It Are the Ones Who Conceive It
about.description: Founded in 1984 by Harold Leidner, a Texas A&M-trained landscape architect, our firm has spent four decades creating luxury outdoor environments for Dallas' most distinguished homes. Our foundational belief is simple: the team that designs your exterior should be the team that builds it. That means no plans sold to outside contractors, no loss of vision in translation. Every project is designed, built, and guaranteed end-to-end by our licensed landscape architects — from Highland Park estates to Fort Worth retreats.

features.title: Licensed Landscape Architects
features.description: Every designer and project manager on our team holds a professional landscape architecture license. Your project is led by credentialed experts, not salespeople.

features.title: Design-Build Guarantee
features.description: We never hand off plans to third-party contractors. The architects who conceive your outdoor space build it themselves, ensuring every detail matches the vision.

features.title: 40+ Years of Proven Excellence
features.description: Featured in Architectural Digest, 14x Best of Houzz winner, and trusted by clients like Troy Aikman. Four decades of iconic results speak for themselves.

pricing.headline: Transparent Investment. Extraordinary Results.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom-scoped to your property and vision. Schedule a consultation to receive a detailed, no-obligation proposal.

guarantee.headline: Our "Iconic Exterior" Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every project we design and build is backed by our complete satisfaction guarantee. If any element does not meet the standard we promised, we return and make it right at our expense. We have upheld this commitment for over 40 years because our reputation is built one property at a time.

faqs.question: How does the design-build process work?
faqs.answer: It starts with an on-site consultation where our licensed landscape architects study your home, property, and vision. We create a comprehensive design, present it for your approval, and then our in-house construction team brings it to life. The same architects oversee every phase — no handoffs to outside contractors.

faqs.question: What areas of Dallas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire DFW metroplex from three office locations — Highland Park, Carrollton, and Fort Worth. Our primary service areas include Dallas, Highland Park, Preston Hollow, University Park, Frisco, and Westover Hills.

faqs.question: How long does a typical project take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary by scope. A pool and landscape project typically takes 3-6 months from design approval to completion. Larger estate projects can take 6-12 months. We provide a detailed timeline during the proposal phase so you know exactly what to expect.

faqs.question: Do you handle maintenance after the project is complete?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our concierge maintenance program keeps your landscape, pool, and outdoor living areas in pristine condition year-round. The same team that built your exterior maintains it, so every detail is preserved exactly as designed.

faqs.question: What sets Harold Leidner apart from other landscape firms?
faqs.answer: We are one of the few firms in Dallas where every designer is a licensed landscape architect, and we never outsource construction. This design-build model means your vision is never lost in translation. Over 40 years, this approach has earned us features in Architectural Digest and 14 Best of Houzz awards.

testimonials.name: Troy Aikman
testimonials.text: I was very pleased with our experience with Harold Leidner and his landscape team. We have used Harold's services on our last two homes, and we would use Harold again if the opportunity presented itself.

testimonials.name: Ryan M.
testimonials.text: Harold Leidner worked on our front and backyard. They did an exceptional job from start to finish. They walked us through the scope and kept us updated throughout. They handled turf, sprinklers, pool, outdoor kitchen, driveway, and patio tile. This is a professional company and I highly recommend them.

testimonials.name: Somer G.
testimonials.text: They turned our backyard into an incredible space. Every contractor was professional and courteous. The transformation exceeded our expectations.

contact.headline:
Ready for an Exterior
That's Truly Iconic?
contact.subtitle: Schedule a complimentary on-site consultation with our licensed landscape architects. We will study your property, discuss your vision, and provide a detailed proposal — no pressure, no obligation.
